mapper.sql: u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.email, u.phone, u.gender, u.signature, u.preferred_region, u.growth_value, u.level, u.points, u.status, u.is_deleted, u.last_login_at, u.created_at, u.updated_at

sql.if: AND (u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_user u WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
